id.description: Unique ID of the gig assignment.

account.description: Unique ID of the account associated with the gig assignment.

created_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the gig object was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when a property value of the gig object most recently changed.

status.description: Current state of the gig assignment.

task_count.description:
Number of discrete tasks in the gig assignment.

**Note:**
When `task_count` is greater than 1 (e.g. two pickups in one delivery), the gig object contains aggregated values for the entire gig assignment. Individual task-level details can be found in the [`task_details`](https://docs.argyle.com/api-reference/gigs#object-task_details) object.

start_datetime.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the gig assignment started.

end_datetime.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the gig assignment ended.

all_datetimes.description: Other timestamps related to the gig assignment.

request_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the gig assignment was created.

accept_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the gig assignment was accepted.

pickup_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when "package" (rider, food, or similar) was obtained.

dropoff_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when "package" (rider, food, or similar) was delivered.

cancel_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the gig assignment was cancelled.

shift_start.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the work shift started.

shift_end.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the work shift ended.

duration.description: Total time of the gig assignment (in seconds).

timezone.description: Timezone ([IANA](https://www.iana.org/time-zones)) where the gig assignment took place.

start_location.description: Starting location information for the gig assignment.

lat.description: Latitude ([ISO 6709](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_6709)) where the gig assignment started.

lng.description: Longitude ([ISO 6709](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_6709)) where the gig assignment started.

formatted_address.description: Full address of where the gig assignment started.

end_location.description: Ending location information for the gig assignment.

lat.description: Latitude ([ISO 6709](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_6709)) where the gig assignment ended.

lng.description: Longitude ([ISO 6709](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_6709)) where the gig assignment ended.

formatted_address.description: Full address of where the gig assignment ended.

task_details.description: Task-level details for the gig assignment.

order_id.description:
Argyle-added reference ID. Connects `events` to `orders`.

**Note:**
Only available if the underlying gig platform provides a clear link between events and their associated orders (monetary charges).

sequence.description: Counter starting at 1. The sequential ordering of each event, as represented by the gig platform.

name.description:
Name associated with the geographical location.

**Note:**
Primarily available for delivery platforms, where name is the pickup establishment (i.e. restaurant name).

formatted_address.description: Full address of the geographical location.

sequence.description: Counter starting at 1. The sequential ordering of each order, as represented by the gig platform.

income.description: Payment and earnings information for the order.

total_charge.description: Total amount charged to the customer.

customer_price.description: Amount the customer paid for the order, not including `fees` and `tips`.

fees.description: Fees charged to the gig employee by the gig platform.

total.description: Total earnings received by the gig employee ( `pay` + `tips` + `bonus` + `other` ).

pay.description: Earnings related to the assignment received by the gig employee.

tips.description: Tips received by the gig employee.

bonus.description: Bonus earnings received by the gig employee.

other.description:
Other payments made or received by the gig employee.

Common examples: refunds (tolls), taxes, partial cash payments, reimbursements, or miscellaneous payments categorized as "other".

distance.description: Distance traveled during the gig assignment.

circumstances.description: Metadata specific to the gig platform, such as whether the assignment occurred during peak hours.

income.description: Payment and earnings information for the gig assignment.

total_charge.description: Total amount charged to the customer.

customer_price.description:
Amount the customer paid for the order, not including `fees` and `tips`.

**Note:**
Only available if directly returned by the gig platform.

fees.description: Fees charged to the gig employee by the gig platform.

total.description: Total earnings received by the gig employee ( `pay` + `tips` + `bonus` + `other` ).

pay.description: Earnings related to the assignment received by the gig employee.

tips.description: Tips received by the gig employee.

bonus.description: Bonus earnings received by the gig employee.

income_rates.description:
Amount earned by the gig employee per hour or per mile.

**Note:**
Values are not calculated, and are only returned if directly provided by the gig platform.
